name: Cala del Pilar
description: One of Menorca's wildest and most isolated beaches: golden sand beneath red clay cliffs, with not a single facility. The long walk and access controls keep it almost untouched, rewarding only those who make the trek.

highlights: one of the wildest, most isolated beaches in the north
the walk through pine wood and scrub to the golden sand beneath red clay
going with nothing and coming back with nothing: not a single facility
